response.justification: Bogdan brings extensive Staff-level software engineering expertise, including recent contributions to AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol, demonstrating strong technical leadership and full-stack capabilities. However, his resume does not clearly show the required 8+ years of experience specifically building production-grade AI solutions, nor does it explicitly cover critical GenAI technologies like RAG or vector databases, which are central to this Forward Deployed Engineer role.
strengths: Staff-level engineer with 15+ years of diverse software development experience.
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP).
Proven technical leadership, mentoring, and full-stack development skills (TypeScript, AWS).
concerns: Insufficient explicit experience (less than 8 years) building production-grade AI solutions.
Lack of demonstrated experience with vector databases and Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) architectures.
Limited evidence of customer-facing responsibilities or deep Python expertise for AI development.
